tests_run.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const schema=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('project/schemas/handoff.schema.json','utf8')); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('project/messages/outbox/M6-BATCH-AUTORUN-BALANCE-DASHBOARD-001__MSG-20260628-M6-BATCH-BALANCE-QA-R2-ACCEPT__qa_reviewer.json','utf8')); const allowed=new Set(Object.keys(schema.properties)); const required=schema.required.every((key)=>key in data); const noExtra=Object.keys(data).every((key)=>allowed.has(key)); const status=schema.properties.status.enum.includes(data.status); const tests=Array.isArray(data.tests_run)&&data.tests_run.every((item)=>item&&typeof item.command==='string'&&Number.isInteger(item.exit_code)&&typeof item.result==='string'&&Object.keys(item).every((key)=>['command','exit_code','result'].includes(key))); if(!required||!noExtra||!status||!tests||Number.isNaN(Date.parse(data.created_at))) process.exit(1); console.log('handoff schema structurally valid');"
